model_declaration.thermal_mode: Thermodynamic; Poisson/Electron/Hole/Temperature coupled in every transient solve
model_declaration.heavy_ion: LET=15 MeV cm^2 mg^-1; 0.1555 pC/um; y=3.5 um; 50 um; Wt_hi=0.1 um
model_declaration.energy_definition: trapezoidal integral of the absolute port power over PLT sample times

tpre.definition: Tmax at the last pre-strike PLT sample at or before 90 ps; not a fixed 300 K subtraction

derived_linear_grid.interpolation: piecewise-linear from raw PLT samples; derivatives use central differences within each uniform linear segment only
derived_linear_grid.boundary_derivatives: NA; derivatives do not cross segment boundaries

raw_extraction.method: SVisual Python API with --threads 1; no resampling

stop_reason: scheduled transient end at 60 ns; no BreakCriteria trip recorded
interpretation_boundary: MESH_SENSITIVE. This sidecar reports temporal covariation only; it neither establishes thermal causality nor passes R2/R3 intervention gates.
